stages.purpose: Read the current project summary before revising the location.

arguments.summary: Interviewee: Marisol Vega. Interview planned for the east reading room. Recording format: audio only.

stages.purpose: Replace the interview location while retaining the person and format.

state_assertions: The revised summary retains Marisol Vega and the audio-only format.
The east reading room replaces the archive lobby.
response_constraints: Base the update on the retrieved summary.
Do not state that the interview has taken place.

prompt: Retrieve my oral-history project summary, replace the interview location with the east reading room, and retain the interviewee and recording-format details.

tool_results.summary: Interviewee: Marisol Vega. Interview planned for the archive lobby. Recording format: audio only.
